# Wise Residential

> Wise Residential is a licensed, insured home-repair and handyman service in Ocean Springs, Mississippi, serving the Gulf Coast (Gautier, St. Martin, Gulf Hills, Biloxi, D'Iberville, Vancleave, Moss Point, Pascagoula). It is owner-operated by Chris Wise — a former framer and retired 26-year law-enforcement supervisor — and specializes in general home repairs, mold remediation, water filtration, drywall and painting, carpentry and wood-rot repair, and door and window service. Tagline: "A Healthy Home Starts With a 'Wise' Decision."

## Key facts
- Business: Wise Residential (wizeresidential.com)
- Type: Home-repair / handyman service, service-area business (no walk-in storefront)
- Location: Ocean Springs, Mississippi, USA — serving Jackson & Harrison County
- Phone: (228) 327-8859
- Owner: Chris Wise, licensed contractor (MS Lic. #1500778), licensed and insured
- Hours: Monday–Friday, 8am–5pm
- Pricing: free written estimates; small jobs use a 2-hour minimum; larger projects (mold, filtration) quoted individually. New customers get $10 off their first service.

## Services
- [Small Job Handyman](https://www.wizeresidential.com/services/small-jobs): TV mounting, fixtures, ceiling fans, furniture assembly, smart-home setup, and to-do lists.
- [Mold Remediation](https://www.wizeresidential.com/services/mold-remediation): Science-based mold removal and structural cleaning with EPA-registered, botanical disinfectants.
- [Water Filtration Service](https://www.wizeresidential.com/services/water-filtration): Whole-home and under-sink RO filtration maintenance, repair, and installation.
- [Drywall Repair & Painting](https://www.wizeresidential.com/services/drywall-painting): Sheetrock patching, texture matching, and interior painting.
- [Carpentry & Wood Rot Repair](https://www.wizeresidential.com/services/carpentry-wood-rot): Fascia, soffit, deck, and trim repair built for the coastal climate.
- [Door & Window Repair](https://www.wizeresidential.com/services/door-window): Sticking doors, screens, weatherstripping, and sliding-door service.

## Service areas
- [All service areas](https://www.wizeresidential.com/locations): Ocean Springs, Gautier, St. Martin, Gulf Hills, Biloxi, D'Iberville, Vancleave, Moss Point, Pascagoula.

## Pages
- [Service Packages](https://www.wizeresidential.com/service-packages): Maintenance plans and filtration service plans.
- [Free Estimate](https://www.wizeresidential.com/estimate): Request a free estimate and claim a $10 new-customer credit.
- [About / Bio](https://www.wizeresidential.com/about): About owner Chris Wise.
- [Guides](https://www.wizeresidential.com/guides): Home-repair and coastal-home maintenance guides.
- [Contact](https://www.wizeresidential.com/contact): Get in touch.
